title: Adding timestamp functionality to timeline columns
excerpt: Currently you can only add dates as part of the timeline column. Some projects have much smaller timeframes or specific times that they need to be delivered. It would be very useful to have times to allow for this. In ad…

posts.author: R_Savage (Rebecca)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently you can only add dates as part of the timeline column. Some projects have much smaller timeframes or specific times that they need to be delivered. It would be very useful to have times to allow for this. In addition, given that the gantt charts work based off this column type it would help facilitate further use of this functionality.
